claim_boundaries.claim: The supplied DocumentsDB archive contains eight Hansard CSV members named Hansard-47.csv through Hansard-54.csv.
claim_boundaries.release_language: Verified source-file coverage is limited to the supplied DocumentsDB extract.

claim_boundaries.claim: The normalized document-level Parquet output preserves 193,922 rows from the supplied source files with zero normalization warnings.
claim_boundaries.release_language: Published row counts describe normalized rows from the supplied extract, not all historical Hansard proceedings.

claim_boundaries.claim: Parliament numbers 47 through 54 are present as source-file partitions in the supplied extract.
claim_boundaries.release_language: Parliament 47-54 presence does not prove that every sitting, debate, vote, question, or speech for those parliaments is complete.

claim_boundaries.claim: Complete historical New Zealand Hansard coverage across all parliamentary periods has not been established.
claim_boundaries.release_language: Do not describe this dataset as a full historical NZ Hansard corpus.

claim_boundaries.claim: Hansard records outside supplied Parliament 47-54 source files are outside the current canonical dataset.
claim_boundaries.release_language: Periods outside the supplied extract require separate retrieval, reconciliation, validation, and publication decisions.

parliament_coverage.notes: Source member and row count are verified; full sitting and historical completeness are not proven.

document_type_coverage.notes: Sampled DocumentType values confirm multiple Hansard document categories, but the current audit does not prove complete type coverage or sitting-level completeness.

authority_cross_check.notes: Authority-source discovery identifies official and candidate inputs for sitting, proceeding, bill, member, and election-period reconciliation, but no historical sitting calendar comparison has been completed in this track.

known_gaps.reason: No source files before Hansard-47.csv are present in the supplied archive.
Row counts by source file are verified, but no official sitting calendar or proceeding ledger has been reconciled against the extracted rows.

known_gaps.range: After the supplied Parliament 54 extract snapshot
known_gaps.reason: The source archive snapshot is dated 2024-09-06 and later Hansard records require a new source extract or official website retrieval.

release_guardrails: Claims may say the dataset covers the supplied DocumentsDB extract for Hansard-47.csv through Hansard-54.csv.
Claims must not say the dataset is a complete historical NZ Hansard corpus.
Endpoint artifacts must cite this manifest when summarising coverage.
Any broader historical claim requires official sitting/proceeding reconciliation and a refreshed coverage manifest.
